def has_active_users(db):
    users = list(db.execute("SELECT id FROM users WHERE active = 1"))
    return len(users) > 0

def count_valid_records(records):
    valid = list(r for r in records if r["status"] == "ok")
    return len(valid)

def any_errors(log_lines):
    errors = list(line for line in log_lines if "ERROR" in line)
    return bool(errors)

def get_result_count(generator):
    items = list(generator)
    return len(items)

def has_items(data_source):
    collected = list(data_source.iterate())
    if collected:
        return True
    return False
